# OpenEvidence Insights Dashboard

> Tracking OpenEvidence and the broader clinical AI landscape: partnerships, products, funding, adoption metrics, competitor analysis, research publications, and benchmark studies.

## Data Endpoints (JSON)
- /data/timeline.json — chronological event log (newest first)
- /data/publications.json — academic publications referencing clinical AI
- /data/benchmarks.json — clinical AI benchmark and evaluation studies
- /data/competitors.json — competitor landscape
- /data/partnerships.json — partnership tracker
- /data/metrics.json — adoption metrics over time
- /data/global_landscape.json — global CDS events
- /data/research.json — consolidated research studies (PubMed + arXiv + Semantic Scholar)

## Data Endpoints (CSV, original format)
- /data/timeline.csv
- /data/publications.csv
- /data/competitors.csv
- /data/partnerships.csv
- /data/metrics.csv
- /data/global_landscape.csv

## Website
- Main dashboard: / (index.html)
- All data updated by automated cron jobs (daily announcement check + weekly research sweep)

## Notes for Agents
- Timeline is descending (newest first)
- Publications include PMID, arXiv ID, and DOI where available
- Benchmarks are categorized by type: tool_comparison, safety_evaluation, knowledge_test, clinical_reasoning, methodology
- All JSON endpoints are served with Content-Type: application/json
- CSV files are served with Content-Type: text/csv
- The dashboard is a single-page app (index.html) with embedded JS data arrays
- JSON endpoints parse the CSV files on-the-fly for structured access

## Research Discovery Methodology
Automated cron jobs monitor:
- PubMed (NCBI E-utilities) for clinical AI publications
- arXiv API for preprints in cs.AI, cs.CL, cs.CY related to clinical AI
- Web search for announcements, news, and coverage
- OpenEvidence announcements page (openevidence.com/announcements)

QC filtering: Results are filtered for relevance to clinical AI decision support tools (OpenEvidence, UpToDate, Doximity, ChatGPT for Clinicians, etc.). Non-relevant results are discarded.
